overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from a video game depicting a group of people gathered around a campfire in an open urban area, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background and distinctive windmill structures. The atmosphere is social and relaxed, illuminated primarily by the warm firelight against the cool blue night sky.

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime view of a social gathering around a campfire in an open desert area on the outskirts of a futuristic city. Several people sit in chairs around the fire while one figure stands to the left. Joshua trees and artistic windmill structures frame the scene, with the glowing skyscrapers of Night City visible in the background under a clear sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle view of a social gathering that anchors a tranquil desert outpost against the backdrop of a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins with a focus on a group of people relaxing in chairs around a glowing campfire, where the warm light contrasts with the deep blue of the clear night sky. As the eye wanders across the scene, the composition is framed by the silhouettes of Joshua trees and artistic windmill structures. The view finally expands to reveal the distant, shimmering skyscrapers of Night City, blending the intimacy of the campfire with the cold scale of the urban horizon.
